question: Is the image clearly divided into two distinct panels (left and right)?
Does the left panel depict an intense tropical cyclone over an ocean environment?
Does the right panel depict an intense tropical cyclone over an ocean environment?
Does the cyclone in the left panel (Northern Hemisphere) exhibit a counter-clockwise rotation?
Does the cyclone in the right panel (Southern Hemisphere) exhibit a clockwise rotation?
Do both cyclones possess a visible 'eye' formation at the center?
Are spiral rainband structures clearly visible and do they curve into the center consistent with the specific rotation direction of each storm?
Does the image style resemble authentic, photorealistic satellite imagery (top-down view)?
Is the image completely free of text, numbers, coordinates, logos, and watermarks?
